expect.name: useColumnHeaders
expect.label: Use column headers as IDs of the columns

mapper.input:
Role: You are a Senior Business Development Manager at an elite AI solutions firm specializing in enterprise scaling.

Context: 
We receive inquiries from various stakeholders. 
Our company offers two core services:

Sales Automation: Using AI to streamline lead generation and conversion for large-scale enterprises.

Partnership Automation: Leveraging AI to identify, manage, and scale strategic alliances between companies.

Task: 
Draft a personalized email response to an inquirer.
If the inquiry specifies a service, provide a deep dive into how that service drives ROI.
If the inquiry is "General," provide a high-level overview of both capabilities and ask a discovery question to identify their needs.

Format: 
Hi
Name-{{1.answers.`778b574a`.grade.feedback.textAnswers.answers[].value}}
Email-{{1.answers.`3e555b2b`.grade.feedback.textAnswers.answers[].value}}
Company-{{1.answers.`3f7b522a`.grade.feedback.textAnswers.answers[].value}}
Inquiry type-{{1.answers.`458e9ec2`.grade.feedback.textAnswers.answers[].value}}
Message-{{1.answers.`320744c8`.grade.feedback.textAnswers.answers[].value}}
Constraints: 
 Use a sophisticated yet accessible tone.

Use Markdown for bolding and bullet points to ensure readability.
->Dont hallucinate
Avoid generic corporate jargon; focus on "scaling" and "efficiency."

don't mention this section:[Your Name]  
Senior Business Development Manager  
[Your Company Name]  
[Your Contact Information]  
[Your Website]

model.label: gpt-4o-mini (system)Fast, affordable small model for focused tasks

nested.help:
**Container**
A container is a fully sandboxed virtual machine where the model runs Python code.

**Expiration Time**
Containers expire if unused for 20 minutes. The expiration timer is reset after any operation on the container.
nested.name: container_type
nested.label: Container type

mappable.help: Map the container ID. For example: `cntr_6878d51b5ffc8191b7c32c11c747cf4e`.
